Class ManagedScheduler

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.ManagedExecutor
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.ManagedScheduler
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class ManagedScheduler extends ManagedExecutor
A thin AutoCloseable wrapper around a ScheduledExecutorService.

Extends ManagedExecutor with scheduling capabilities. Can be registered with MagicRuntime.manage() for automatic shutdown when the runtime closes.

    Method
    Description
    ScheduledExecutorService

    Returns the underlying scheduled executor for direct use.

    Schedules a task with a fixed delay between completion and next start.

      public ScheduledExecutorService executor()

    • scheduleAtFixedRate

      public ScheduledFuture<?> scheduleAtFixedRate(Runnable task, long delay, long period, TimeUnit unit)
      Schedules a task at a fixed rate.
      Parameters:
      task - task to run
      delay - initial delay
      period - period between runs
      unit - time unit
      Returns:
      scheduled future handle

      Schedules a task with a fixed delay between completion and next start.
      Parameters:
      task - task to run
      initialDelay - initial delay
      delay - delay between runs
      unit - time unit
      Returns:
      scheduled future handle

    • schedule

      public ScheduledFuture<?> schedule(Runnable task, long delay, TimeUnit unit)
      Schedules a one-shot task.
      Parameters:
      task - task to run
      delay - delay before execution
      unit - time unit
      Returns:
      scheduled future handle
